payload.title: AWS enables production-grade AI agents in regulated finance
payload.summary: Stripe deployed a production-grade AI agent system on AWS using Amazon Bedrock, achieving a 26% reduction in review handling time while maintaining human oversight, demonstrating significant enterprise AI adoption in regulated financial services.

payload.title: AWS optimizes SageMaker AI model training with NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs
payload.summary: Amazon Web Services enhanced AI model training on Amazon SageMaker by integrating NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, leveraging expanded memory and new precision formats to reduce training constraints and improve infrastructure performance.
